reason: The first draft referenced the global 7088-row embedding bank, which was incompatible with the declared sealed test32 sequence/embedding boundary. It was replaced before any OPEN_TRAIN target model selection or fitting by a physically isolated 226-row real-embedding bank.
replacement_closure_note: Final pre-fit closure explicitly fixed sub-inner folds at 5 and all-226 residual targets as five-fold whole-parent cross-fitted M2 predictions.
